match.userMessage:
Handheld camera with subtle natural micro-movement slowly pushes in from wide eye-level framing toward Scarlett standing at the shoreline. She holds a poised stance and shifts into a warm direct smile straight to lens.
Scarlett delivers the voiceover line with a soft inviting tone while maintaining eye contact and gentle smile.
Gentle waves lap steadily at the sand under golden hour light.

[SCARLETT, warm closing]: "One shade. One summer."

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves lapping at shore with soft beach breeze.
